who: fleet operations managers in logistics companies managing 5-15 vehicles
offer: For fleet operations managers in logistics companies processing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient scheduling causes vehicle downtime. We provide a scheduling system instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient scheduling of preventive maintenance tasks leading to vehicle downtime
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where fleet operations managers seek advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar challenges
DM outreach to fleet managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for fleet management tools
try_it: Let users try task scheduling interface and maintenance tracking dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
